---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in crx-permission-analyzer

labels: bug

---

DESCRIPTION

A clear description of the bug.


STEPS TO REPRODUCE

1. Run the command or call the function
2. Provide the manifest.json content or permissions used
3. Show the actual output


EXPECTED BEHAVIOR

What you expected to happen.


ACTUAL BEHAVIOR

What actually happened. Include error messages or incorrect output.


ENVIRONMENT

- Node version
- OS
- crx-permission-analyzer version


ADDITIONAL CONTEXT

Any other relevant information.
